headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $22
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $21 to $22.
